allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== 当前用户启动文件夹 ==="; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Out-String; Write-Host "=== 公用启动文件夹 ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name | Out-String)
PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.Triggers -match "AtStartup|AtLogon" -and $_.State -ne "Disabled" } | Select-Object TaskName, TaskPath, State | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== .git ==="; if \(Test-Path "c:\\Users\\29419\\Desktop\\cc test\\.git"\) { Write-Host ".git 存在"; Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\29419\\Desktop\\cc test\\.git" -Depth 0 | Select-Object Name, Mode } else { Write-Host ".git 不存在（本地仓库未创建）" }; Write-Host "=== GitHub Desktop 配置的仓库 ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub Desktop"\) { Write-Host "GitHub Desktop 数据目录存在" } else { Write-Host "未找到 GitHub Desktop 数据" })
